title: spermacoce suaveolens var. tenella
intro: Spermacoce suaveolens var. tenella, a variant of the Spermacoce suaveolens plant, is a species of flowering plant in the Rubiaceae family. It is commonly known as the "sweet-scented bedstraw" and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is said to possess antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its various health benefits, including wound healing, fever reduction, and digestive issues relief. The herbal preparations of Spermacoce suaveolens var. tenella include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various ailments.
